details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest immediate economy taxi under $20 (home -> station)
Task 2: Schedule sedan ride with OFFICE10 promo under $35
Task 3: Multi-stop trip for 3 passengers under $40
Task 4: Save Home/Work and book from Work to City Library (standard taxi)
Task 5: Wheelchair-accessible ride this afternoon, highest-rated under $30
Task 6: Modify upcoming airport ride (change time and upgrade vehicle)
Task 7: Cancel soonest upcoming ride with wallet credit refund
Task 8: Contact support about overcharged fare on most recent completed trip
